title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Aramex India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Aramex India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aramex India family as a Fleet Manager in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!
